name: National Vision Holdings, Inc.
summary: PARTI National Vision Holdings, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and its consolidated subsidiaries are referred to here as we, our, us, the Company, or National Vision. National Vision Holdings, Inc. conducts substantially all of its activities through its indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary, National Vision, Inc. (NVI), and NVIs subsidiaries.
